description: Calculate the maximum length of cable (in meters) that can fit on a wooden reel using the 'Cable Reel Capacity' calculator in the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. Use the following dimensions: Reel Flange Diameter (800 mm), Reel Barrel/Core Diameter (400 mm), Reel Traverse/Width (500 mm), Edge Clearance (50 mm), and Cable Diameter (16 mm). Save the calculated capacity to '/sdcard/reel_capacity.txt' and a screenshot of the calculator showing the inputs and result to '/sdcard/reel_capacity_evidence.png'.
